channel.title: Policy on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Policy on jamesm.blog

item.title: The AI Energy Crisis: Why Data Center Power Will Define the Next Decade
item.description: A grounded look at the energy constraint becoming the binding limit on AI deployment in 2026 - the power demand, the transformer backlogs, the grid interconnect queues, the rising consumer electricity prices, and what it means for the shape of the next decade of compute.

item.title: AI Safety From First Principles: What Actually Matters vs What's Hype
item.description: Stripping the AI safety conversation down to its load-bearing parts, separating the engineering problems that matter today from the speculative scenarios that absorb most of the attention.
